transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: Vivid examples survive locally, but the chapter jumps backward among conclusions, arguments, headings, and setup before terminating at its opening apparatus, making sustained reading nearly impossible.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Concrete social rituals and sensory examples support a coherent progression, though repeated assurances, sweeping promises, and a closing recap prolong points after they have landed.

parsed.generic_mechanism: Logical sequencing lets each example revise and deepen the preceding claim; disrupting that sequence converts purposeful recurrence into disconnected assertion and removes both momentum and payoff.
